persona.description: A casual browser with low purchase intent who may leave if approached too strongly.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper stands between two nearby options. 2-5s: The shopper turns head and gaze from the left product to the right product while both remain visible. 5-8s: The shopper points or moves a hand between the two products to compare them side by side. 8-10s: The shopper remains between both options without choosing either one.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper stands between two nearby options.
The shopper turns head and gaze from the left product to the right product while both remain visible.
The shopper points or moves a hand between the two products to compare them side by side.
The shopper remains between both options without choosing either one.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: two comparable products placed side by side on the same accessible display surface, with both products fully visible throughout the shot.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper stands between two nearby options.
The shopper turns head and gaze from the left product to the right product while both remain visible.
The shopper points or moves a hand between the two products to compare them side by side.
The shopper remains between both options without choosing either one.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a skincare aisle with soft shelf lighting; visible product setup: two comparable products placed side by side on the same accessible display surface, with both products fully visible throughout the shot.
Customer behavior style: The shopper stays near the display and examines details with visible curiosity.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper stands between two nearby options.
- 2-5s: The shopper turns head and gaze from the left product to the right product while both remain visible.
- 5-8s: The shopper points or moves a hand between the two products to compare them side by side.
- 8-10s: The shopper remains between both options without choosing either one.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
